text:
Program of All-inclusive 
Care for the Elderly (PACE) plans are waived from reporting Plan Benefit Package information. For 
those plans that did not report, the value of this variable will be blank. 

Provisions in the Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act of 2010 (ACA) changed the way 
benchmarks are calculated to improve continuity of Part D plan enrollment for LIS beneficiaries. Refer 
to the CMS Medicare Prescription Drug Benefit Manual for additional details (reference, for example:
